title: Junior Frontend Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Junior Frontend Engineer to join our team. As a Junior Frontend Engineer, you will be responsible for building responsive and user-friendly interfaces for our web applications.

Responsibilities:
- Develop high-quality frontend code using React and JavaScript/TypeScript
- Collaborate with designers to implement visually appealing UI components
- Work with backend engineers to integrate APIs and ensure seamless data flow
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of our codebase
- Troubleshoot and debug issues to ensure a smooth user experience

Must-have skills:
- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- React
- Node.js
- Jest
- Mocha/Chai

Nice to have:
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines
- Familiarity with Webpack and other bundling tools
- Knowledge of GraphQL
